summary: VenuLoQ Premium Refinement Pass Testing Complete - All features verified working: warmer ivory/stone background (#EDE9E1), premium tab styling with bold active state and gold underline, refined My Case hierarchy with dark event hero, premium RM card, concierge-style assistance section with priority 'Request a Callback' dark card, complete Profile page rewrite with dark hero/avatar/chip selectors, polished bottom navigation with prominent 'My Case' tab, /my-enquiries redirect to /home, Google login redirects to Emergent auth.
critical_code_review_comments: PREMIUM BACKGROUND VERIFIED: CustomerHome uses #EDE9E1 (rgb(237, 233, 225)) warmer ivory/stone background
PREMIUM TABS VERIFIED: Case Detail tabs have bold active state with gold underline (border-[#D4B36A], font-bold)
EVENT HERO VERIFIED: Dark card (bg-[#0B0B0D]) displays event name, city, date, guests with gold accents
RM CARD VERIFIED: Premium white surface with RM name, message button, 'Your Concierge' label
ASSISTANCE SECTION VERIFIED: Request a Callback has dark priority card styling (bg-[#0B0B0D]), Schedule Site Visit and Ask a Question present
STICKY CTA VERIFIED: 'Message Your RM' button fixed at bottom of case detail page
PROFILE PAGE VERIFIED: Dark hero with avatar, name, email; editable name input; disabled email input; chip selectors for cities/event types; notifications toggle; Save/Sign Out buttons
BOTTOM TAB BAR VERIFIED: 5 tabs (Home, Explore, My Case, Messages, Profile); My Case has prominent dark circle treatment; 60px height
MY-ENQUIRIES REDIRECT VERIFIED: /my-enquiries redirects to /home for authenticated users
GOOGLE AUTH VERIFIED: Redirects to auth.emergentagent.com (Emergent-managed auth) on non-production domains
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium refinement pass complete. All customer-facing pages (My Case, Profile, Bottom Navigation) have been updated with warmer ivory/stone background (#EDE9E1), premium styling, and consistent visual language. ProfilePage was completely rewritten with chip selectors for preferences. The /my-enquiries route redirects to /home. Google login uses Emergent auth for non-production domains.
